visual_description: A man in a suit and tie is seen crouching in a field of straw, with a chicken nearby. Inside a vehicle, an older man wearing a cap and plaid shirt is seated, holding a small bird close to his face. The man in the car gazes toward the side window as the vehicle moves.
audio_description: The audio clip begins with a burst of high-energy, professionally produced pop-rock music, immediately immersing the listener in a dense, layered soundscape. The instrumentation features a driving drum kit with a punchy kick, snare, and crisp hi-hats, a melodic bass guitar, and two electric guitars—one providing rhythmic, distorted chords and the other a bright, arpeggiated lead. A synthesizer pad adds harmonic depth, while a subtle, high-frequency shaker or tambourine enhances the rhythmic texture. The mix is wide and immersive, with instruments panned across the stereo field and a clear, studio-quality reverb on vocals and drums. At the forefront, a male lead vocalist sings energetically in English, delivering the repeated phrase "na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na na
